name: Gourmet's Genoise Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup Clarified Butter, Melted And Cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a metal bowl, whisk together the eggs and sugar until combined.
2. Place the bowl on a pan of simmering water, ensuring it's covered with water.
3. Continue whisking the mixture until warm and the sugar is fully dissolved.
4. Remove the bowl from the hot water and beat at moderate speed for 10-15 minutes or until the batter triples in volume and reaches room temperature.
5. Sift flour and salt onto a sheet of wax paper.
6. In a separate bowl, combine vanilla and melted clarified butter.
7. Sift the flour mixture into the egg mixture in batches, folding gently to combine.
8. Stir a quarter of the batter into the butter mixture, then fold back into the main batter.
9. Butter an 8-1/2-inch springform pan, line with wax paper, and dust lightly with flour.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared pan, smoothing the surface.
11. Bake in the center of a preheated oven at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
12. Allow the cake to cool in the pan on a rack for 5 minutes.
13. Carefully remove the side of the pan, invert onto the rack, and let it cool completely before serving.
